---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for ROBIN-FPGA
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem statement

Is your feature request related to a problem you have hit in practice? Please describe the use case.

> Example: "I'm always frustrated when training a policy on Intel Agilex 7 because ..."

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you want to happen. Sketch the API if you have one in mind:

```python
# proposed API
agent.train_curriculum(['versal', 'agilex'], schedule='alternating')
```

## Alternatives considered

What other approaches did you think about, and why is the proposed one better?

## Scope

Is this:

- [ ] A small change (one file, < 50 LOC)
- [ ] Medium (a new module, ~few hundred LOC)
- [ ] Large (a new subsystem, possibly affecting public API)

If large, would you be willing to write a short design document first?

## Are you willing to contribute the implementation?

- [ ] Yes, I can submit a PR
- [ ] Partial — I can prototype but need help finishing
- [ ] No, I just want to surface the idea

## Additional context

Anything else: papers, related projects, screenshots, sketches.
